use_cases: Triggering form submissions in web applications
Navigation actions and primary call-to-action buttons
Secondary action buttons for multi-step workflows
Icon-only buttons for compact UI interfaces
ai_summary: A foundational Button component with multiple visual variants including default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Supports standard, small, large, and icon sizes. Built with Radix UI Slot for polymorphic rendering and Tailwind CSS for styling, featuring standard focus ring and hover state transitions for accessibility.
